item.title: Amazon AGI 总监表示，阻碍 VB Transform 2026 企业部署的是 AI 代理的可靠性，而不是能力
item.summary: The enterprise AI industry has a math problem. Cisco data shows 85% of enterprises are piloting AI agents, but only 5% have shipped them to production. At VB Transform 2026 on Tuesday, Bryan Silverthorn , Director of AGI Autonomy at Amazon, explained why that gap persists — and why the answer isn't better benchmarks. S
